name: Manual endpoint (scaffold)
description: A blank scaffold for a host discovery can't auto-detect — a model server on another box (LAN or tailscale), or one behind a key. Clone it, then set the real URL and model in the Endpoints editor (or run Scan to fill them from a live host). If the host needs a key, reference it by keyRef and set the value under Settings → Keys; it never lives in this document. Names no model or port a scan hasn't confirmed.
